expectations.text: Skill notes the type mismatch (sequence is wrong for schema)
expectations.evidence: flags type mismatch in first sentence

expectations.text: Skill proposes ER as the right type and proceeds with ER, OR asks one clarifying question and routes to ER on confirmation
expectations.evidence: proposes ER and asks for schema content rather than inventing it

expectations.text: If a diagram is produced, it is an ER diagram (entity keyword + crow's-foot relations), not a sequence diagram
expectations.evidence: no diagram of wrong type produced; correctly defers to ELICIT
